title: onobrychis sativa var. culta
intro: Onobrychis sativa var. culta, also known as cultivated sainfoin or alsike clover, is a type of legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide relief from symptoms associated with menopause and osteoporosis. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Onobrychis sativa var. culta can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to support overall health and well-being.
